title: Unique 82097 - Latex Communion Balloons - 30 cm - Blue Holy Cross Religious Party - 8 Count (Pack of 1)
features: Pack of 8 Blue Holy Cross Communion Balloons
Latex balloons measure 30 cm when fully inflated (ship flat)
Ideal for decorating a Communion celebration
Packaged balloons may vary in colour or shade from inflated balloons
Combine with other Blue Holy Cross religious party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description Add a special touch to a First Holy Communion with these elegant Blue Holy Cross Latex Balloons. Featuring a delicate holy cross design in a soft blue hue, these balloons are perfect for decorating venues, creating balloon arrangements, or gifting as part of the celebration. A beautiful and meaningful way to honour this sacred milestone! Safety Warning Warning: CHOKING HAZARD-Children under 8 years can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Keep uninflated balloons from children. Discard broken balloons at once. MADE OF NATURAL RUBBER LATEX. TO PROTECT THE EYES FROM POSSIBLE DAMAGE, THE USE OF A BALLOON PUMP OR HELIUM TANK IS RECOMMENDED. STRETCH BALLOONS BEFORE INFLATING. DO NOT OVER INFLATE.
